# BED Interval Analysis

| HighConf_Genome | 1,047,093 | 2.39 Gbp | 2,278 | 1,234 | 77.26% |

## Recommendation

**`HighConf_Genome`** is 10x larger than the next-biggest interval set (`Low_Mappability`). This extreme spread can defeat Hail partition pruning and create class imbalance in batch-effect statistics.

Consider downsampling to match the second-largest set:

```bash
python downsample_bed.py sample \
    --input <HighConf_Genome_path> \
    --match-file <Low_Mappability_path> \
    --output <HighConf_Genome_downsampled.bed>
```
